texto: We might think we know how we are being affected by the media—a book, a movie, a TV series. Ironically, this so-called awareness, the “third person effect,” is most common with, according to Gierzynski, “those with higher education.” He notes that “we think we know how the media affects us,” but in truth, it controls us more than we know.
explicacao: Citação de Anthony Gierzynski sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We might think we know how we are being affected by the media—a book, a movie, a TV series. Ironi…” articula reflexao, media, values em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como values.
